scripts.dev: npm run backend:dev & npm run frontend:dev
scripts.build: uv build --project backend && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.format: uv run --project backend ruff format . && npm --workspace frontend run format
scripts.format:check: uv run --project backend ruff format --check . && npm --workspace frontend run format:check
scripts.lint:fix: uv run --project backend ruff check --fix . && npm --workspace frontend run lint:fix
scripts.lint: uv run --project backend ruff check . && npm --workspace frontend run lint
scripts.typecheck: uv run --project backend pyright && npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: uv run --project backend pytest && npm --workspace frontend run test
